input: Best route from Tbilisi to Yerevan, diesel van, 3.5 tons, prefer scenic.
expected_output: Recommended: via Sadakhlo border, then M6 highway. Distance: 290km, ~6h. Fuel cost estimate: ~28L diesel (~). CO2: ~74kg. Scenic stop: Khndzoresk cave village (+40min). Border wait time historically: 45-90min. Bring USD cash.
